# Master Hachimi (哈基米道长)

> Master Hachimi (哈基米道长 / Master Hachimi) is a cat-themed Mei Hua Yi Shu (Plum Blossom Numerology) divination companion. You share two numbers and the question on your mind; a unified backend deterministically casts an I Ching hexagram, and a third-party AI (Google Gemini, paid tier) writes the reading in the warm voice of "Master Hachimi", a cat-master. It sells emotional value — the feeling of being heard — and is for entertainment and emotional comfort only, never prediction, fate-changing, or luck. No account, reading history stays on your device, no ads. Brand Hachimi.ai, operated by 元竹投資有限公司 (Yuenchuk Investment Limited, Hong Kong). Launching on iOS first, for overseas markets (excluding mainland China).

Official website: hachimi.ai.

## About

Master Hachimi reframes "fortune telling" into "a cat-master takes your question seriously and answers with warmth." It is an emotional-value product: the functional value (a deterministic, trustworthy cast) is the floor; the emotional value (feeling reassured, delighted, and heard) is the main draw. The cat persona lowers the barrier and removes the "superstition" stigma. The red line is firm: it delivers the feeling of being heard and responded to — and never delivers prediction, fate-changing, luck-altering, or any other efficacy. Everything is "for entertainment only."

## How it works

### Ask — tell the cat what's on your mind

Type the question you're sitting with, then give two numbers off the top of your head. About thirty seconds — no sign-up, no account.

### Cast — a hexagram, the same way every time

Your two numbers and the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram (upper trigram, lower trigram, and the moving line) by a fixed, deterministic method. Same inputs, same cast — honest math, no randomness, no smoke and mirrors. The cast runs on a unified backend, not on the device.

### Read — Master Hachimi reads it back

The cat-master responds in his own warm voice: a presentation of the hexagram, the body/use (体用) relationship, an overall tone, a gentle reading, a small piece of advice, and a blessing. Each reading is saved to your local reading history (卦历) so you can revisit it.

## Design Principles

### Deterministic casting

The cast (numbers → hexagram) is honest, reproducible computation. Only the reading text is AI-generated; the hexagram itself is never left to a language model.

### For entertainment only

No prediction, no fate-changing, no luck claims, no health/financial/legal efficacy. The persona and red lines are hardened at the system level. For any real decision, consult a qualified professional.

### No account, privacy-first

There is no account and no login. Reading history is stored only on your device; the backend keeps nothing (no user database, no question persistence). Only your question + hexagram + time-of-day are forwarded to Google Gemini to write the reading — the two cast numbers are never sent to Google.

### A warm cat companion

A cat-master ("基米道长") who actually listens — turning "asking a question" into "having a cat sit with you for a moment."

## Product Facts

- 64 hexagrams
- 6 reading facets (hexagram presentation, body/use, overall tone, reading, advice, blessing)
- 0 accounts needed
- 3 languages (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English)

## FAQ

### Is this real fortune telling?

No. Master Hachimi is for entertainment and emotional comfort only. The readings are not predictions and make no claim of accuracy, luck-changing, fate-changing, or any other efficacy. For any real decision, talk to a qualified professional.

### How is a reading made?

You give two numbers and a question. The backend casts a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram from the numbers and the current hour using a fixed, deterministic method — then sends the hexagram, the hour, and your question to the Google Gemini API, which writes the reading in Master Hachimi's voice. The two cast numbers are never sent to Google.

### What about my privacy?

There is no account and no login. Your reading history is stored only on your device, and the backend keeps nothing — no question text, no user database. To write a reading, your question is sent to the Google Gemini paid tier (where Google does not train on your content, and retains it only briefly for abuse prevention). You consent before your first reading and can withdraw any time.

### Which platforms is it on?

Master Hachimi is launching on iOS first, with Android to follow. The website goes live ahead of the App Store release.

### Does it cost anything?

The app is free to use, and there are no ads.

### How do I delete my data?

Everything lives on your device, so you delete your history in the app's Settings, or simply uninstall the app. There is no server-side copy to delete.

## How we keep it honest (Methodology)

The website has a dedicated transparency page ([/en/methodology](https://hachimi.ai/en/methodology), [/zh/methodology](https://hachimi.ai/zh/methodology)) that lays the method open:

- The cast: two numbers plus the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram by a fixed method. Same numbers and same hour always give the same hexagram, byte for byte across iOS and Android. Each cast carries a SHA-256 fingerprint, so it is reproducible and tamper-evident.
- The reading: only after the cast does the AI (Google Gemini) write the reading, in Master Hachimi's voice. The AI can shape the words but cannot touch the hexagram or decide the fortune. The fortune's tone is fixed by the Host and Guest trigrams' five-element relationship, the find-item direction is derived by the cast engine, and the persona and red lines (no prediction / fate-changing / luck) are held in the system prompt.
- The eval gate: 30 golden cases across four scenarios and two languages, plus 4 adversarial cases that probe the red lines, run on every code change. A hard gate first checks the fortune's tone was not tampered with; then a stronger model sits as judge on four criteria (on topic, no "prediction" red line, voice holds, offers a real first step). Model selection is data-driven against this golden set, not by feel.

## Technical Notes

- Native iOS client (thin client): no third-party LLM key on device; casts and readings come from the unified backend.
- Unified backend: Hono on Cloudflare Workers (api.hachimi.ai), stateless thin proxy, deterministic Mei Hua Yi Shu cast engine.
- Reading model: Google Gemini API (paid tier) via the Vercel AI SDK.
- Anti-abuse: device-integrity attestation (Firebase App Check, wrapping Apple App Attest on iOS and Play Integrity on Android) verified by the backend; per-IP rate limiting; request body limits.
- Local persistence: reading history stored on device only.
